commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer review of the combined/profile-only auth-epoch boundary; automation cannot supply the external proof gate.; Needs attention: The diff changes an auth/session invalidation boundary and can weaken host-credential invalidation for combined-mode CLI backends.; Review finding: [P2] Preserve combined auth-epoch mode — src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.ts:191 (sha=0ee6f860cacf9f28776547a1e153341fba1272a4)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes auth-profile credentials suppress local CLI credential hashing, bumps `CLI_AUTH_EPOCH_VERSION`, updates auth-epoch tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main hashes both local and profile epoch parts, so mocking the local Claude credential reader from `null` to an OAuth credential while the profile stays stable changes the epoch, and `resolveCliSessionReuse` maps that mismatch to `auth-epoch`; I did not run a live gateway flow.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer review of the combined/profile-only auth-epoch boundary; automation cannot supply the external proof gate.

target.title: fix(agents): keep cli-auth-epoch stable when local credential file presence flips
target.author: mushuiyu886
